title: Maintainer-banned patterns and resubmission tombstones
description: Executable record of maintainer rejections on doldecomp/melee PRs. banned.jsonl holds one record per maintainer finding (agent_exhibit records feed L3 preship review as retrieval exhibits; human-approved regex records become extra review_lint rules). tombstones.jsonl holds fuzzy token-shingle hashes of rejected hunks so resubmitting a rejected change is mechanically blocked by scan_diff.
consumers: L3 preship review prompt (agent_exhibit retrieval candidates)
